creator: rowens@fvcc.edu
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #10)
Would you be willing to add your current dmesg?  I'm trying to get the touchpad working on a Dell Latitude 5500 (*not* E5500); I've applied the patchset rev.2 (attachment 207905) over 13 CURRENT r352911, and I'm trying to figure out what's missing.
